text:
In the first scene, standing before the glass-walled meeting room, I feel a sense of anticipation and possibility. The space is pristine and organized, yet empty, evoking thoughts of collaboration that is about to unfold or has just finished—moments of decision and dialogue suspended in time. The silence is thick, inviting reflection.

In the second scene, the vibrant, text-covered R+D wall and interactive displays energize me. Here, curiosity stirs, my mind drawn to themes of invention and exploration. There is a hum of innovation in the air. I feel inspired by humanity's perpetual quest to learn and improve, pondering my own role in the ongoing narrative of research and discovery.
